offer: For property managers processing 5–15 rental properties/month, manual statement generation causes cash flow gaps. We automate owner statement generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations and document creation.
problem: Manual generation of monthly owner statements is time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try customizable statement templates and dashboard for free
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
